title: CloudWatch Metrics & Logs Insights
description: Master CloudWatch Metrics and Logs Insights for comprehensive cloud monitoring. Architect automated dashboards and high-resolution alarms to detect anomalies in key performance indicators like error rates and P99 latency.
objectives: Master CloudWatch Metrics and Logs Insights for comprehensive cloud monitoring.
Architect automated dashboards and high-resolution alarms to detect anomalies in key performance indicators like error rates and P99 latency.
